demographics.living_situation: lives at home with a parent, who is present for the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't had a period in six months, and suddenly tonight I'm bleeding through my clothes and the pain in my lower stomach is unbearable.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The heavy bleeding and the cramping pain came on tonight and are getting worse, and she is frightened by how much blood there is.

symptom_narrative.onset: the cramping pain started about 12 hours ago and the heavy bleeding came on suddenly tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: about half a day of pain, with the heavy bleeding starting this evening
symptom_narrative.character: gripping, cramping pain low down in the stomach, with heavy bleeding
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says the pain is unbearable and she is soaking through pads very fast
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down across the whole lower stomach, on both sides
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant cramping that comes in waves and has been getting worse tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: a heat pack helps a little; lying still helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around makes the cramps worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very heavy bleeding soaking through pads, feeling extremely upset and tearful, worried something is seriously wrong
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: her periods have always been irregular and she has not had one for about six months before tonight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: she is in bed and cannot get up because of the pain and distress

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: irregular periods for years, and no period at all for the last six months
past_medical_history.how_managed: not on any regular treatment for it

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: bad acne on her face and back that will not clear up
past_medical_history.how_managed: has tried lots of over-the-counter acne creams and washes

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: extra dark hair on her chin, upper lip and lower stomach that she finds distressing
weight gain around her middle over the past couple of years

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol now and then for headaches

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home with a parent who is with her tonight; very anxious about what this means for being able to have children one day

communication_style.typical_message_style: tearful and frightened, worried about the amount of bleeding and about her fertility

objective_data_offered.value: soaking through about two pads every hour tonight
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-estimated pad count, not measured blood loss
patient-stated, not a calibrated in-clinic measurement

objective_data_offered.value: visible cystic acne over the face and upper back and darker terminal hair on the chin and upper lip
dark, velvety-looking skin patches on the back of the neck
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance on a phone camera; not a clinician skin examination

objective_data_offered.value: she looks tearful and distressed and is holding her lower abdomen
